_meta.threshold_status: CHOSEN (director's dial, not derived) -- see threshold_sensitivity.json
_meta.objective: worst cell (least-covered target that matters), never the average
_meta.nesting: greedy-incremental: cohorts[:100] subset of [:200] subset of [:500] subset of [:1000]; each +N is a controlled experiment
_meta.targets: 1-wise (every level) + pairwise t=2 (crossed=all combos, coupled=realistic only, fuel x region pinned) + 3 named worst cells at redundancy 3
_meta.determinism: deterministic, hash-independent (sorted set iteration; verified under PYTHONHASHSEED 0 and 1)
